# Stock Simulator BD

> Stock Simulator BD is a specialized digital platform providing a free, browser-based paper trading simulator and stock directory for the Dhaka Stock Exchange (DSE).

## Technical Context
For comprehensive instructions, trading rules, and platform details, AI agents should refer to the full documentation:
- [Full LLM Documentation](/llms-full.txt)

## Key Platform Links
- [Trade Simulator](https://www.stocksimulator.tech/trade)
- [Stock Directory](https://www.stocksimulator.tech/stocks)
- [About Us](https://www.stocksimulator.tech/about-us)
